risks.title: Security file modifications without confirmation
risks.evidence: Security.tsx modified 4 times within 17ms window with high relevance scores (0.95, 0.85)
risks.recommendedAction: Review changes to Security.tsx and verify they don't introduce vulnerabilities; run security tests

risks.title: Event deduplication failures
risks.evidence: Duplicate code-modification events detected for same file at timestamps 2026-04-27T19:02:39.029-30Z and 19:02:22.476-77Z
risks.recommendedAction: Investigate and eliminate source of duplicate events to improve signal quality

opportunities.title: Strengthen security review process
opportunities.evidence: Active modifications to Security.tsx component provide opportunity to validate security practices
opportunities.suggestedAction: Establish automated security checks and review workflow for auth/security-related files

taskCandidates.title: Review Security.tsx changes
taskCandidates.description: Inspect recent modifications to src/screens/Security.tsx and verify no vulnerabilities introduced
taskCandidates.rationale: High-relevance events indicate active changes to security-critical component

taskCandidates.title: Run security tests on Security.tsx
taskCandidates.description: Execute security and unit tests for the Security component to validate changes
taskCandidates.rationale: Follow-up to code review; validate changes work as intended

taskCandidates.title: Implement event deduplication logic
taskCandidates.description: Add filtering to deduplicate code-observer events arriving within millisecond windows
taskCandidates.rationale: Reduce noise and improve signal quality in event stream

recommendations.title: Add security-file tagging rules
recommendations.rationale: Security.tsx is a critical component; automated tagging will trigger enhanced review workflows
recommendations.action: Configure observer to tag files in src/screens/Security* and src/**/auth* as security-critical

recommendations.title: Establish event deduplication window
recommendations.rationale: Duplicate events within 20ms suggest a logging or observer issue that degrades visibility
recommendations.action: Implement 100ms deduplication window for identical file modification events

pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Review Security.tsx changes
